response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with roughly 19 years of experience spanning web, embedded, and open-source work, and his founder role plus recent MCP/AI-agent tooling exposure touch the preferred criteria. However, this is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and experience advising strategic customers and shaping cloud product direction — none of which appear in his track record, which is almost entirely senior IC delivery work at small-to-mid-size companies.
strengths: Nearly two decades of broad, hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products at the depth the role requires
Career has stayed at senior/staff IC level with no evidence of director-level strategic or organizational influence
Limited large-scale cloud platform strategy experience; cloud work is mostly application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deploys)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product leadership
No director-level strategic or advisory experience
Meets 15-year experience bar with founder and AI-tooling exposure
